description: LLM tool-selection eval: given a natural-language question and the server's tools, the model must pick the right tool. Run with scripts/eval-llm.mjs (needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY).

cases.question: I'm calling Partner Center and getting HTTP 401 with code 900420. What's wrong and how do I fix it?
